question: What's the last line of the rhyme under the flavor name on the headstone visible in the background of the photo of the oldest flavor's headstone in the Ben & Jerry's online flavor graveyard as of the end of 2022?

chat_for_question.content:
=== QUESTION (GAIA Level 2) ===
What's the last line of the rhyme under the flavor name on the headstone visible in the background of the photo of the oldest flavor's headstone in the Ben & Jerry's online flavor graveyard as of the end of 2022?

Call budget for this question: 1 (this call).

Respond with:
<final_answer>Your answer</final_answer>

The oldest flavor in the Ben & Jerry's online flavor graveyard is **Dastardly Mash**, which was introduced in 1979 and retired in 1991. On the Ben & Jerry's website (as of the end of 2022), the individual page for Dastardly Mash features a photo of its headstone. In the background of this photo, the headstone for the flavor **Fresh Georgia Peach** (1986–1991) is clearly visible.

The full rhyme on the Fresh Georgia Peach headstone is:
"Fresh-picked peaches
In peach ice cream
It was a peach lover's
Ultimate dream."

The last line of the rhyme under the flavor name on the headstone visible in the background is "Ultimate dream."

<final_answer>Ultimate dream.</final_answer>
